examples: Don had a hefty roll of flab overhanging his waistband.
The slacks have an elastic waistband.
Some jeggings have faux zip-flies and pockets, while others just have an elastic waistband and no pockets.
We know very well that our ancestors were much smaller than we are: in height, not just waistband.
Ms. Thomson's solution: a shaper slip without the kind of elastic waistband that could cause bulges a dance partner might feel.
